title.en: China-to-North Macedonia BESS Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入北马其顿：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入北馬其頓：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against North Macedonia CE-aligned electrical safety and EMC rules, ISRSM-adopted EN battery standards, ERC storage and MEPSO grid-connection requirements, fire-safety review, and UN 38.3 transport expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与北马其顿 CE 对齐电气安全与 EMC 规则、ISRSM 采纳 EN 储能标准、ERC 储能及 MEPSO 并网要求、消防安全审查和 UN 38.3 运输要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與北馬其頓 CE 對齊電氣安全與 EMC 規則、ISRSM 採納 EN 儲能標準、ERC 儲能及 MEPSO 併網要求、消防安全審查和 UN 38.3 運輸要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, CE scope determination, ERC licence decision, MEPSO interconnection approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, project developers, designers, and installers should verify current North Macedonia product-safety, ISRSM standard adoption, ERC, MEPSO, customs, and local fire-authority requirements with qualified North Macedonia professionals before shipment, sale, interconnection, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定、CE适用范围裁定、ERC许可决定、MEPSO并网批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、项目开发商、设计方和安装方在出货、销售、并网或安装前，应与合格北马其顿专业人士核实现行北马其顿产品安全、ISRSM 标准采纳、ERC、MEPSO、海关及当地消防要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定、CE 適用範圍裁定、ERC許可決定、MEPSO併網批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、項目開發商、設計方和安裝方在出貨、銷售、併網或安裝前，應與合格北馬其頓專業人士核實現行北馬其頓產品安全、ISRSM 標準採納、ERC、MEPSO、海關及當地消防要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to North Macedonia, the practical baseline is CE-aligned product compliance where the equipment falls under low-voltage, EMC, machinery, radio, RoHS, or related product rules; ISRSM / EN battery-safety evidence is commonly required for safety files, UN 38.3 is needed for lithium-battery transport, and ERC plus MEPSO review is separate for storage projects and interconnection.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口北马其顿时，实务基线是设备落入低电压、EMC、机械、无线电、RoHS或相关产品规则范围时，应满足 CE 对齐产品合规；ISRSM/EN 储能安全证据通常用于安全文件；锂电运输需要UN 38.3；储能项目和并网还需单独处理ERC与MEPSO审查。
answer_first.zht: 中國 BESS 出口北馬其頓時，實務基線是設備落入低電壓、EMC、機械、無線電、RoHS 或相關產品規則範圍時，應符合 CE 對齊產品合規；ISRSM/EN 儲能安全證據通常用於安全文件；鋰電運輸需要 UN 38.3；儲能項目和併網仍需單獨處理 ERC 與 MEPSO 審查。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
